sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== All nodes ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    print(f"ID {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, children={n['children']}")

print("\n=== Adjacency ===")
for a in seg['adjacency_list']:
    print(a)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
